overall.description: Cinematic game engine footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a dystopian urban cityscape at dusk. The camera slowly pans across a dense cluster of neon-lit skyscrapers and industrial structures from an elevated rooftop vantage point, with smoke drifting through the hazy atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk metropolis rooftop overlook with dense skyscrapers

events.description: a flying vehicle traverses the sky between distant buildings

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the cityscape from an elevated position, slowly panning left across the skyline

entered.detail: large metal ventilation unit with X-bracing mounted on the building facade
tall corporate tower with vertical neon lighting and illuminated signage
industrial smokestack releasing dark plumes into the hazy sky
cluster of bright red neon lights on lower building rooftops
large illuminated advertisement screen glowing on building facade
small aerial car briefly visible flying between skyscrapers

segments.scene_description: A slow panoramic view of a dystopian cyberpunk cityscape at dusk, dominated by towering skyscrapers with neon lighting and industrial smoke. The camera pans left from an elevated aerial position, revealing dense urban architecture with a large ventilation structure in the left foreground. Midway through the segment, a flying vehicle briefly crosses the distant sky between buildings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a slow panoramic sweep across a dystopian cyberpunk cityscape at dusk, moving from a focused industrial foreground toward a vast, neon-lit urban horizon. It begins from an elevated aerial position, panning left to reveal a dense cluster of towering skyscrapers shrouded in industrial smoke. As the camera glides across the architecture, a large ventilation structure anchors the left foreground, framing the oppressive scale of the city. The view then expands further into the hazy atmosphere, where a flying vehicle briefly crosses the distant sky between the glowing monoliths before the movement settles on the sprawling, illuminated skyline.
